name: Fountain Head Hybrid Energy
description: Public-information desktop Pre-DD screen of a diesel-PV-BESS hybrid microgrid opportunity at the Fountain Head gold mine (Pine Creek, Northern Territory, Australia). Covers F1 approval delta, F2 site suitability, F3 microgrid boundary and F4 financeability readiness. A screen of readiness, not a verdict on the project.

data_coverage.note: Public environmental-assessment documents date from 2020-2022; the Heliovulcan desktop screen was built and published June-July 2026.

disclaimer: Independent public-information screen. Not commissioned by, endorsed by or verified with the project owner. Not legal, financial, tax, engineering, investment or lender due-diligence advice. All figures are indicative screening outputs and must be independently verified before any commercial decision.
